passive.name: Way of the Wanderer
passive.description: Yasuo's Critical Strike Chance is increased. Additionally, Yasuo builds toward a shield whenever he is moving. The shield triggers when he takes damage from a champion or monster.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate - Intent:}} {{ci|Yasuo}} gains increased {{as|{{sti|critical strike chance}}}}, but his {{tip|critical strikes}} deal reduced damage.
wiki_detail.blurb2: He also gains {{as|{{sti|attack damage}}}} from excess {{as|{{sti|critical strike chance}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Innate - Resolve:}} '''Yasuo's''' movement generates the {{tip|Flow}} resource. He gains a brief {{tip|shield}} when taking damage from a {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|monster}} at maximum '''Flow''', consuming all of it.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Intent:}} '''Yasuo's''' {{as|{{sti|'''total''' critical strike chance}}}} is doubled from all other sources, but his {{tip|critical strike|critical strikes}} deal only{{ft|{{as|{{critical damage|{{ccd|Yasuo|crit_base}}|100|mod={{ccd|Yasuo|crit_mod}}}} AD}} {{as|physical damage}}.|{{fd|{{#expr:{{ccd|Yasuo|crit_mod}}*100}}}}% of the {{sti|{{as|critical damage}}}} champions usually have.}}Additionally,{{ft|every {{as|1% critical strike chance}} in excess of {{as|100%|critical strike chance}} is converted into {{sti|{{as|{{fd|0.5}} '''bonus''' attack damage}}}}.|every {{as|50% critical strike chance}} in excess of {{as|100%|critical strike chance}} is converted into {{sti|{{as|25 '''bonus''' attack damage}}}}.}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Resolve:}} '''Yasuo''' generates {{tip|Flow}} for every {{pp|59 to 46 for 3|1 to 13}} units he travels by any means. At{{ft|100 stacks|{{pp|59*100 to 46*100 for 3|1 to 13}} units traveled}}and upon taking damage from an enemy {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|monster}}, '''Yasuo''' consumes all {{tip|Flow}} to grant himself a {{tip|shield}} for {{pp|125+(475/17*(x-1)*(0.7025+0.0175*(x-1)))}} that lasts up to 1 second.
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
* '''Yasuo''' is able to reach {{as|100% critical strike chance}} with ''Way of the Wanderer's'' multiplier after obtaining a total of {{sti|{{as|50% critical strike chance}}}}.
wiki_detail.tips:
* Taking into account '''Yasuo's''' {{as|345 '''base''' movement speed}} and assuming he's constantly moving, it will take {{pp|5900/345 to 4600/345 for 3|1 to 13}} seconds to generate 100 {{tip|Flow}} stacks.
** Taking into account the {{as|45 '''bonus''' movement speed}} that most [[boots|Tier 2 boots]] grant (resulting in {{as|390 '''total''' movement speed}}), it will take {{pp|5900/390 to 4600/390 for 3|1 to 13}} seconds to generate 100 {{tip|Flow}} stacks.

Q.name: Steel Tempest
Q.description:
Thrusts forward, damaging all enemies in a line.

On hit, grants a stack of Gathering Storm for a few seconds. At 2 stacks, Steel Tempest fires a whirlwind that knocks Airborne.

Steel Tempest is treated as a basic attack and scales with all the same things.
Q.tooltip:
Yasuo thrusts, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage. If he hits, he gains a stack for {{ gatheringstormduration }} seconds. While he has 2 stacks, his next use of this Ability fires a whirlwind from range, dealing the same damage and Knocking Up for {{ knockupdurationtooltiponly }} second.

If used while dashing, this Ability strikes in a circle rather than a stab.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Yasuo''' thrusts his sword in a line in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and applies {{tip|on-hit}} and {{tip|on-attack}} effects at 100% effectiveness to the first enemy hit. ''Steel Tempest's'' damage can {{tip|critically strike}} for{{ft|{{as|{{critical damage|{{ccd|Yasuo|crit_base}}|100|mod=0.945|base=105}} AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.|90% of the {{sti|{{as|critical damage}}}} champions usually have.}}
wiki_detail.description2: If this hits at least one enemy, '''Yasuo''' generates a [[stack]] of ''Gathering Storm'' for 6 seconds, stacking up to 2 times and refreshing on subsequent hits. At 2 stacks, the next ''Steel Tempest'' consumes them all to become empowered with a new effect.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Gathering Storm Bonus:}} '''Yasuo''' unleashes a whirlwind in the target direction that deals the same damage to enemies hit and {{tip|airborne|knocks them up}} for {{fd|0.75}} seconds, or {{fd|0.9}} seconds in combination with ''{{ai|Sweeping Blade|Yasuo}}''.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Steel Tempest's'' thrust is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}} if '''Yasuo''' is affected by {{tip|disarming crowd control}} during the cast time, but its {{sti|cooldown}} is reset to {{fd|0.1}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description5: If ''Steel Tempest'' is cast during ''{{ai|Sweeping Blade|Yasuo}}'', it will instead affect enemies around '''Yasuo''' at the end of the dash, or doing so immediately at his landing location after {{tip|Blink|blinking}} while ending the dash prematurely.
wiki_detail.static: {{as|{{pp|type='''bonus''' attack speed|4 to 1.48 for 8;4/3|key1=%|0 to 105;1000/9|formula=4*(1-(0.01 per 1.67% '''bonus''' attack speed)). ''This is capped at 67% reduction at 111.1% '''bonus''' attack speed.''}}|attack speed}}
wiki_detail.cast time: {{tt|{{as|{{pp|type='''bonus''' attack speed|round=3|0.35;0.33;0.297;0.264;0.231;0.198;0.175|key1=%|0;13.72;36.358;58.996;81.634;104.272;120|formula=0.35-0.035 per 24% '''bonus''' attack speed)). ''This is capped at 50% reduction at 120% '''bonus''' attack speed.''}}|attack speed}}|Thrust cast time}} / {{tt|{{as|{{pp|type='''bonus''' attack speed|round=3|0.35;0.33;0.297;0.28|key1=%|0;13.72;36.358;48|changedisplay=true|formula=0.35-0.035 per 24% '''bonus''' attack speed)). ''This is capped at 20% reduction at 48% '''bonus''' attack speed.''}}|attack speed}}|Whirlwind cast time}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Casting {{ai|Sweeping Blade|Yasuo}} when Steel Tempest's remaining cooldown is less than {{fd|0.5}} seconds resets this remaining cooldown to allow casting it in combination, but adds the refunded time to the cooldown of that cast. If '''Yasuo''' becomes unable to cast abilities during the dash after buffering, Steel Tempest will not cast, but will still go on cooldown.''{{bug|2}}
* The one ''Gathering Storm'' stack is named ''Steel Wind Rising''.
* The whirlwind from consuming stacks of ''Gathering Storm'' can strike targets whose center is behind '''Yasuo''', unlike most [[Projectile|missiles]].
* The whirlwind is not released when cast during {{ai|Sweeping Blade|Yasuo}}, but instead {{tip|airborne|knocks up}} all enemies hit around '''Yasuo''' at the end of the dash.
* ''Steel Tempest'' applies {{tip|basic damage}} to the first (closest) enemy hit and {{tip|area damage}} to secondary enemies:
** ''Steel Tempest'' will apply {{tip|on-hit}} effects to the first target hit, but will not do so to the secondary ones.
** ''Steel Tempest'' will not apply [[ability effects|spell effects]] to the first target hit, but will do so to the secondary ones.
** {{stil|Spell vamp}} will only grant {{tip|heal|healing}} from the damage dealt to secondary targets, and healing is reduced to 33% effectiveness, accordingly.
** {{stil|Life steal}} will heal based on the damage dealt to the first target hit.
* The whirlwind is a missile and can therefore be {{tip|projectile|intercepted}}.
* ''Steel Tempest'' will only draw minion aggro if the first target is a champion.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* Each parry has different interactions with this ability, whether it's the first target of ''Steel Tempest'' or the secondary one. In either case '''Yasuo''' still gains a stack of ''Gathering Storm'' and his whirlwind knock-up cannot be negated by parries:
** {{tip|Dodge}}: both first target and secondary target '''do not''' take damage.
** {{tip|Block}}: first target '''does not''' take damage, secondary target '''does''' take damage.
** {{tip|Blind}}: both first target and secondary target '''do''' take damage.
* ''Steel Tempest'' rolls its {{tip|critical strike|critical strikes}} individually against each enemy hit.
* Casting {{ai|Last Breath|Yasuo}} during ''Steel Tempest'' will buffer it to cast after the cast time has completed.
** However, if {{ai|Last Breath|Yasuo}} is used on a target affected by an {{tip|airborne}} source that is not '''Yasuo''', it is cast immediately due to ''Steel Tempest's'' cast time ending prematurely. ''Steel Tempest'' will still cast in this case.
* If ''Steel Tempest'' is buffered during ''Sweeping Blade'' and '''Yasuo''' uses {{si|Recall}}, {{si|Teleport}} or {{ii|Hextech Rocketbelt}}, ''Steel Tempest'' will go on cooldown without casting. In ''Protobelt's'' case '''Yasuo''' will also need to cast a movement command after it, else ''Steel Tempest'' will still trigger.
** If, after this effect, '''Yasuo''' inputs a basic attack command quickly followed by a movement command, he will cast ''Steel Tempest'' around him and basic attack the target at the same time.{{bug|1}}
*** ''Steel Tempest'' will not go on cooldown.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} does not prevent a stack of ''Gathering Storm'' from being gained.
* While at two stacks, a range indicator will be shown for the effective range of the whirlwind.
wiki_detail.tips:
* Casting {{ai|R|Yasuo}} while buffering ''Steel Tempest'' during {{ai|Sweeping Blade|Yasuo}} will also trigger the damage <u>after</u> the ''blink'', thus avoiding the ''Gathering Storm'' stack reset.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Yasuo}} thrusts his sword in a line in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and applies {{tip|on-hit}} and {{tip|on-attack}} effects to the first enemy hit. This can {{tip|critically strike}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If this hits an enemy, '''Yasuo''' generates a stack of ''Gathering Storm'' for a few seconds. At 2 stacks, the next ''Steel Tempest'' consumes them all to become empowered with a new effect.
wiki_detail.blurb3: If ''Steel Tempest'' is cast during ''{{ai|Sweeping Blade|Yasuo}}'', it instead affects enemies around '''Yasuo'''.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Gathering Storm Bonus:}} '''Yasuo''' unleashes a whirlwind in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} and briefly {{tip|airborne|knocks up}} enemies hit.

W.name: Wind Wall
W.description: Creates a moving wall that blocks all enemy projectiles for 4 seconds.
W.tooltip: Yasuo creates a drifting wall of wind that blocks all enemy projectiles for 4 seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Yasuo}} raises a wind wall that drifts in the target direction for a few seconds, blocking all enemy {{tip|projectile|projectiles}} that hit it.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Yasuo''' raises a wall of wind that travels in the target direction over {{tt|{{fd|0.25}} seconds|Estimated}}. It then drifts another 50 units over {{fd|3.75}} seconds, blocking all hostile non-{{tip|turret}} {{tip|projectile|projectiles}} that hit it and granting {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings.
wiki_detail.range: {{tt|0 - 350|Windwall distance (final 50 units traveled only slowly)}} / {{tt|450|Center of sight area}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Wind Wall'' grants {{tip|sight}} in a small static area in front of the cast location.
* ''Wind Wall'' starts blocking projectiles on-cast (despite not being fully formed).
* ''Wind Wall'' travels via a missile, and thus stops upon colliding with an enemy ''Wind Wall''.

E.name: Sweeping Blade
E.description:
Dashes through target enemy, dealing magic damage. Each cast increases subsequent dash's damage, up to a max amount.

Cannot be re-cast on the same enemy for a few seconds.

If Steel Tempest is cast while dashing, it will strike as a circle.
E.tooltip:
Yasuo dashes through a target, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. Each use of this Ability grants {{ bonusdamageperstack }} bonus damage to subsequent uses for {{ stackduration }} seconds, stacking up to {{ maxstacks }} times.

This Ability has a {{ e2 }} second per-target Cooldown.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Yasuo}}{{tip|dashes}} in the target enemy's direction, dealing {{as|magic damage}},  briefly becoming {{tip|ghosted}}, and generating a stack of ''Ride the Wind'' for a few seconds, stacking up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Sweeping Blade'' cannot be cast on the same target for a period.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Ride the Wind:}} Each stack increases ''Sweeping Blade's'' damage.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Yasuo''' {{tip|dashes}} a fixed distance in the direction of the target enemy. Upon impact, he deals them {{as|magic damage}}, becomes {{tip|ghosted}} for {{tt|2 seconds|Estimated}}, and generates a stack of ''Ride the Wind'' for 5 seconds, which refreshes on subsequent hits and stacks up to 4 times.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Ride the Wind:}} ''Sweeping Blade's'' damage is increased by 25% per stack, up to {{ap|25*4}}% at maximum stacks.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Sweeping Blade'' can be cast on the same target only once every few seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: '''''Yasuo''' will be {{tip|knockdown|knocked down}} by any {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} or {{tip|polymorph|polymorphing}} crowd control, excluding {{tip|sleep}}{{bug}}, during Sweeping Blade.''
wiki_detail.description5: ''{{ai|Last Breath|Yasuo}} can be cast during the dash. If ''{{ai|Steel Tempest|Yasuo}}'' has been buffered, ''{{ai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}}'' may also be cast during it. {{bug|2}}''
wiki_detail.range: {{tt|475|Dash distance}} / {{tt|625|Maximum increased dash distance across terrain}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The on-target cooldown will be applied upon starting the dash.
* ''Sweeping Blade's'' dash speed is affected by {{stil|movement speed}}.
* ''Sweeping Blade'' will generate {{fd|7.5}} {{tip|Flow}} stacks per cast that travels the maximum distance.
* '''Yasuo''' can use ''Sweeping Blade's'' fixed dash distance to cross walls both before and after hitting his target (provided his proximity to the wall and/or target allows it).
* After ''Sweeping Blade'', '''Yasuo''' becomes {{tip|ghosted}} for a moment to prevent situations where he would face extreme cases of body block.
* If '''Yasuo''' cancels a buffered ''{{ai|Steel Tempest|Yasuo}}'' by {{si|Recall|Recalling}}, casting ''Sweeping Blade'' will allow him to cast it an additional time to the right by inputting a movement command.{{bug|1}}
** ''Sweeping Blade'' will act as if '''Yasuo''' is the target, dealing the damage to himself and generating a stack of ''Ride the Wind''.
*** If this kills '''Yasuo''', he will not receive the gold and will gain a death on the leaderboard. <!-- Pending: Receiving bounty bonus gold -->

R.name: Last Breath
R.description:
Blinks to an Airborne enemy champion, dealing physical damage and holding all Airborne enemies in the area in the air. Grants maximum Flow but resets all stacks of Gathering Storm.

For a moderate time afterwards, Yasuo's critical strikes gain significant Bonus Armor Penetration.
R.tooltip:
Yasuo teleports to an Airborne enemy champion, dealing {{ damage }} physical damage and holding all nearby Airborne enemies up for an additional {{ rknockupduration }} second. Yasuo also gains maximum Flow, but loses all Steel Tempest stacks.

Afterwards, Yasuo's critical strikes ignore {{ rpercentarmorpen }}% bonus Armor for {{ rbuffduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Yasuo}} {{tip|blinks}} to the target {{tip|airborne}} enemy champion and instantly generates max {{tip|Flow}}. He then briefly {{tip|airborne|knocks up}}, {{tip|true sight|reveals}}, and deals {{as|physical damage}} to all nearby {{tip|airborne}} enemies.
wiki_detail.blurb2: He becomes empowered for some time, causing his {{tip|critical strikes}} to gain {{sti|lethality|{{as|'''bonus'''-armor penetration}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Yasuo''' {{tip|blinks}} to the other side of a {{tip|sight|visible}} {{tip|airborne}} enemy champion {{tt|nearest to the cursor|searches in a 1100 radius}}, instantly generating maximum {{tip|Flow}} while resetting ''{{ai|Steel Tempest|Yasuo|Gathering Storm}}'' stacks.
wiki_detail.description2: Upon arrival, he {{tip|airborne|knocks up}} all nearby {{tip|airborne}} enemy champions for 1 second, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them, becoming {{tip|lockout|unable to act}} himself, and slashing them with his sword over the duration to deal {{as|physical damage}} thereafter. Surrounding enemy champions that become {{tip|airborne}} during this time will also be affected by ''Last Breath'' through the remaining duration.
wiki_detail.description3: For the next 15 seconds, the damage dealt by '''Yasuo's''' {{tip|critical strikes}} ignores {{sti|lethality|{{as|60% of the target's '''bonus''' armor}}}}.
wiki_detail.description4: ''A nearby {{tip|airborne}} enemy champion is required to cast this ability. If '''Yasuo''' would blink inside the {{sti|attack range}} of an enemy {{tip|turret}} (excluding the {{tip|Nexus Obelisk}}), Last Breath will instead attempt to position him outside of it.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Last Breath'' can be casted on targets {{tip|suspension|suspended}} in mid-air by {{cais|Aqua Prison|Nami}} {{tip|stun}}. 
** The wiki has adopted the term ''suspension'' for this unique property due to a statement by '''Yasuo's''' designer.<ref>[http://www.reddit.com/r/leagueoflegends/comments/1s0gkx/were_the_yasuo_team_ama/cdsp1op Yasuo Reddit AMA]</ref>
* ''Last Breath'' requires the target to be affected by {{tip|airborne}} from an {{tt|enemy source|from the target's perspective}}, and simultaneously that the target is not considered {{tip|cc-immune}}, {{tip|displacement immune}}, or {{tip|untargetable}} during it.
** ''Last Breath'' cannot be cast if there are no nearby enemy champions that meet the conditions.
*** Attempting to cast the ability on an enemy champion that is not airborne will indicate that they "''Must Be Airborne!''"
** Self-applied or allied-applied {{tip|airborne|displacements}} do not allow ''Last Breath'' to target the champion. Those applied by the ''neutral'' team (e.g. {{uis|Dragon}} initial knock back) '''can''' be targeted.
** An [[spell indicator|indicator]] will be placed towards enemy champions that meet the cast conditions within range of ''Last Breath'' to signify the ability can be cast.
** {{ai|The Hextech Ultimatum|Camille}} will prevent '''Yasuo''' from casting ''Last Breath'' on an airborne enemy champion outside its borders.
*** '''Yasuo''' can only do so if the airborne enemy champion is inside the zone.
* Upon ''Last Breath's'' cast, the targets' facing directions snap to '''Yasuo'''. Afterwards, their facing directions shift in all other directions every {{fd|0.25}} seconds over the duration of the airborne.
** The last shift snaps them to the facing direction of the second one.
** On the {{csl|Yasuo|Nightbringer}} skin, these shifts in facing direction do not occur, but the targets' facing directions will still snap to '''Yasuo''' upon ''Last Breath's'' cast.
* '''Yasuo''' does not need {{tip|sight}} of enemy champions near his target to affect them with the ability.
* Even if the target is protected by {{tip|spell shield}} the ability will still affect them and deal damage, but the ''spell shield'' will be consumed.
* ''Last Breath'' applies its damage and removes its forced movement on the target when it ends, including if it is removed early by being {{tip|cleanse|cleansed}}.
** This is in contrast to most other effects with {{tip|airborne}}, which have their forced movement linger if the disabling debuff is removed and have to be overridden by another movement spell (such as {{cai|Relentless Pursuit|Lucian}} or {{si|Flash}}).
** It behaves similar to {{cai|Aqua Prison|Nami}} in this but is not considered {{tip|suspension}}.
* Terrain displacing abilities (e.g. {{ai|Weaver's Wall|Taliyah}}, {{ai|Pillar of Ice|Trundle}}, {{ai|Volcanic Rupture|Ornn}}) that affect enemy champions are considered {{tip|airborne}}, and will therefore interact with ''Last Breath''.
* While ''blinking'', '''Yasuo''' creates an {{tip|untargetable}} ''clone'' of himself that cues a dashing animation (similar to {{ais|Sweeping Blade|Yasuo}}) towards the target. This unit's rules do not follow those of a {{tip|clone|clone's}}. As such, it is more alike a champion, unless special cased.
* While performing ''Last Breath'', '''Yasuo''' is {{tip|lockout|locked out}} of performing actions.
** The lock out will end prematurely if '''Yasuo''' dies as well as by the following if all targets:
*** {{tip|Cleanse}} the {{tip|airborne|knock up}}.
*** Are too far away from '''Yasuo'''.
*** Leave '''Yasuo's''' {{tip|sight}} (e.g. by {{tip|nearsight}}).
*** Become {{tip|untargetable}}.
*** {{tip|Death|Die}}.
*** Enter the {{ai|Realm of Death|Mordekaiser}}.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Yasuo''' is locked out:
{{ct|attack=false|move=false|cast=false|items=false|consume=false|spells=true, false, false, false, false|interrupts=false}}
